author: Toei Animation
text:
Saint Shamrock l ONE PIECE l Epsidoe 1167
Saint Shamrock
Commander of the Knights of God.
A World Noble of the Figarland Family.
Son of Saint Garling, one of the Five Elders.

ONE PIECE Episode 1167 is simulcast streaming.
